reasoning: The Kansas City Chiefs are perennial favorites to win the AFC West, having won it for 9 consecutive seasons (2016-2024). They have the best quarterback in the NFL in Patrick Mahomes and a top-tier head coach in Andy Reid. Despite the Chargers making improvements under Jim Harbaugh, the Chiefs generally remain the frontrunners in the division. Taking into account the base rate of dominant NFL teams winning their division year-over-year, alongside typical NFL parity, injuries, and offseason uncertainties, an initial baseline of ~65-70% is appropriate for odds predicting division winners over six months out. Assuming the odds are around -200 (implied probability ~66.7%), I estimate the Chiefs have roughly a 65% chance of keeping the AFC West crown.
